revision.comment: split color data out from [[Module:Color contrast]]
Protected Module:Color contrast/colors: [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefinite))
add more from http://www.w3schools.com/html/html_colornames.asp
Add gray aliases; see [[devmo:Web/CSS/color_value]]
Accidentally changed the indentation to spaces
tabularise, because you know it makes sense - https://github.com/godlygeek/tabular
